title: Chattuli
overview: Chattuli follows Maari, a blind elderly man, and Kannan, a teenage villager, who meet in the Attappadi forest and discover a shared desire for revenge. United by their painful pasts, they embark on an adventures journey through the wilderness. Their path becomes one of survival, strength, and hard-fought redemption, where the forest becomes a battleground for both their inner and outer struggles.
